message:
feat(runtime_compat): migrate task module to asupersync with thread-local handle (ft-1m7nk)

Add cfg-gated asupersync implementation for runtime_compat::task module:
- task::spawn uses thread-local ASUPERSYNC_HANDLE for ambient runtime access
- JoinHandle wrapper provides Result<T, JoinError> API matching tokio
- JoinSet implementation with try_join_next and abort_all
- install_runtime_handle/clear_runtime_handle for test fixture support
- Runtime::block_on automatically installs handle into thread-local

Update RuntimeFixture to install handle, enabling ObservationRuntime
integration tests under asupersync. Add 3 new integration tests:
startup/shutdown, channel dispatch, and shutdown propagation.

Both tokio (default) and asupersync-runtime paths compile and pass tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
